name: Prompt or token anomaly
triggers: prompt tokens exceed threshold for workflow baseline
token cost spikes beyond configured budget band
facts_to_gather: repeated file reads or tool outputs
classification_rules: if retrieval count rises sharply then likely retrieval_overfetch
if repeated large file reads occur then likely context_duplication
if overlapping background workflows exist then likely schedule_or_design_issue
if completion spike occurs without prompt spike then likely downstream_verbosity_issue
verification_checks: prompt and token levels return toward baseline
improvement_prompts: Should this workflow become a specialist agent?
Should repeated file contexts be summarized or cached?
